title: pfaffia holosericea
intro: Pfaffia holosericea, also known as suma or Paraguay tea, is a plant native to South America, particularly in the Amazon region, and is a type of sedge that grows in wetlands and along rivers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Pfaffia holosericea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to help manage blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Pfaffia holosericea is typically prepared as a tea or in capsule form, and it can also be added to smoothies or other herbal remedies.
